creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
- Fix help menu which tries to open help files from
  share/sane/xsane/doc instead of share/doc/xsane where they are
  installed
- Add LICENSE_FILE
- Switch GIMP option to options helpers
- Pet portlint: regenerate and rename patches
- Fix pkg-message: the plugin now shows up in File->Create and not in
  File->Acquire
